'''nalozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cracowe|cracowe]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-l-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cracowe|cracowe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nalozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nælezeth|nælezeth]] || [[word:nælezej|nælezej]] || [[word:nælezesh|nælezesh]] || [[word:næleze|næleze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nalolozoth|nalolozoth]] || [[word:nalolozoj|nalolozoj]] || [[word:nalolozosh|nalolozosh]] || [[word:nalolozo|nalolozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nalozoth|nalozoth]] || [[word:nalozoj|nalozoj]] || [[word:nalozosh|nalozosh]] || [[word:nalozo|nalozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nalofzoth|nalofzoth]] || [[word:nalofzoj|nalofzoj]] || [[word:nalofzosh|nalofzosh]] || [[word:nalofzof|nalofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nalozotho|nalozotho]] || [[word:nalozojo|nalozojo]] || [[word:nalozosho|nalozosho]] || [[word:nalozoko|nalozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nalozoth|nalozoth]] || [[word:nalozoj|nalozoj]] || [[word:nalozosh|nalozosh]] || [[word:nalozo|nalozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nalozothol|nalozothol]] || [[word:nalozojol|nalozojol]] || [[word:nalozoshol|nalozoshol]] || [[word:nalozokol|nalozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nalozothotho|nalozothotho]] || [[word:nalozojojo|nalozojojo]] || [[word:nalozoshosho|nalozoshosho]] || [[word:nalozoko|nalozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nalozothon|nalozothon]] || [[word:nalozojon|nalozojon]] || [[word:nalozoshon|nalozoshon]] || [[word:nalozokon|nalozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nalozothoro|nalozothoro]] || [[word:nalozojoro|nalozojoro]] || [[word:nalozoshoro|nalozoshoro]] || [[word:nalozokoro|nalozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
